summary: Iteration 10 testing of Light Stimulation module with new HRV and HRA calculations. Fixed critical backend bug (array shape mismatch) in compute_light_hrv and compute_light_response_v2. All backend tests pass (56/56). Frontend UI features verified for HRV/HRA display. Yellow highlights on BF chart not rendering (potential timing/state issue).

ui_bugs.issue: ReferenceArea (yellow highlights) for light stim pulses not rendering on BF chart. SVG inspection shows no recharts-reference-area elements.

fixed_bugs.issue: ValueError: operands could not be broadcast together with shapes (N,) (N-1,)
fixed_bugs.fix: Fixed array alignment in compute_light_hrv() and compute_light_response_v2() - beat_times (N elements) now properly aligned with BF/NN intervals (N-1 elements)

fixed_bugs.issue: Old tests expecting deprecated field names (nn_70, median_nn_isolated)
fixed_bugs.fix: Updated tests to use current field names (median_nn_ref, rate_of_change)

passed_tests: ✅ Backend /api/light-hrv returns ln_sdnn70 in final metrics (verified)
✅ Backend /api/light-hrv per_pulse has all 5 HRV columns: rmssd70, ln_rmssd70, sdnn, ln_sdnn70, pnn50
✅ Backend /api/light-response returns HRA metrics: avg_bf, peak_bf, peak_norm_pct, time_to_peak_sec, amplitude, rate_of_change
✅ Backend /api/light-response uses shared baseline from -2 to -1 min before first stim
✅ Backend /api/light-detect generates 5 pulses with correct intervals
✅ Frontend Light HRV readout shows ONLY ln(RMSSD₇₀) and ln(SDNN₇₀) - 2 metrics
✅ Frontend Light HRV per-pulse table shows 5 columns: ln(RMSSD₇₀), RMSSD₇₀, ln(SDNN₇₀), SDNN₇₀, pNN50₇₀
✅ Frontend Light HRA readout shows 6 metrics: Avg BF, Peak BF, Peak %, Time to Peak, Amplitude, Rate of Change
✅ Frontend Light HRA readout does NOT show Beats or Beat End (correct)
✅ Frontend Info icons (ⓘ) present on HRV and HRA metrics (13 icons found)
action_items: MEDIUM: Investigate why ReferenceArea yellow highlights not rendering on BF chart in LightPanel.js. The code at lines 305-318 looks correct but elements are not appearing in SVG. May be state timing issue with displayPulses variable.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed critical array alignment bug in analysis.py - beat_times has N elements while BF/NN intervals have N-1 elements
LightPanel.js ReferenceArea opacity increased from 0.12 to 0.18 for better visibility (when rendering works)
All HRV/HRA metric displays verified to match specification

success_rate.frontend: 90% (HRV/HRA display correct, yellow highlights not rendering)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Light Stim module features mostly working: 1) Backend now correctly aligns beat_times (N) with BF/NN intervals (N-1), 2) ln_sdnn70 field present in API responses, 3) Frontend displays correct metrics in HRV readout (2 metrics) and HRA readout (6 metrics), 4) Info tooltips present. ISSUE: Yellow ReferenceArea highlights on BF chart not rendering - code at LightPanel.js lines 305-318 looks correct but SVG elements not appearing. May need investigation of state/props flow for displayPulses.

features_verified.ln_sdnn70_in_api: Working - returned in both per_pulse and final
features_verified.hrv_table_5_columns: Working - Pulse, ln(RMSSD₇₀), RMSSD₇₀, ln(SDNN₇₀), SDNN₇₀, pNN50₇₀
features_verified.hra_readout_6_metrics: Working - Avg BF, Peak BF, Peak %, Time to Peak, Amplitude, Rate of Change
features_verified.hra_no_beats_beat_end: Working - Beats and Beat End not in HRA readout
features_verified.info_tooltips: Working - 13 info icons found in Light Stim section
features_verified.yellow_highlights: NOT WORKING - ReferenceArea not rendering on chart

rca_of_bug_fixed: The backend compute_light_hrv() and compute_light_response_v2() functions had array shape mismatch errors. beat_times_min_list has N elements (one per beat), but BF/NN intervals are derived from consecutive beats, resulting in N-1 values. The fix aligns the arrays by using bt_full[:len(bf)] to ensure beat times and interval arrays have the same length before applying time-based filtering masks.
